title: Debris Magneto
hook: Roll a giant magnet ball across a junk-strewn arena - small scrap snaps on instantly, big scrap needs repeated passes, then dump your load at the recycler before the ball maxes out.
hook_ru: Катай гигантский магнитный шар по заваленной хламом арене - мелкий лом цепляется сразу, крупный нужно проехать несколько раз, затем сгружай груз на переработчик, пока шар не переполнился.
mechanic: Top-down physics-arcade: drag/swipe to roll a magnet ball around a dirty grid arena; scrap within the magnet radius pulls in and accretes to the ball's surface (small=1 pass, medium=2-3 passes, large=locked until magnet strength tier>=2). A capacity meter fills as you collect and SATURATES (stops collecting) until you roll onto the recycler pad to dump for score. Clean the floor to a per-stage target % to advance through 8 named arena tiers. NON-TIMER pressure = capacity scarcity + clean-% target + jam build-up from un-cleared non-magnetic crates (the lose condition). Escalating debris types (medium scrap, crates, sticky tar that slows you, dead-weight magnetized mines) and a continuous-sweep combo multiplier keep the 10-min loop fresh. Between stages, spend score on three upgrade lines (capacity / magnet pull / magnet radius).
twist: Magnetism + accretion as the cleaning verb: scrap visibly snaps onto and crusts the rolling ball (Katamari-style accumulation), with a capacity/saturation squeeze and a dump-loop that no prior cleaning game in the portfolio uses. Not a mop-absorb (Satisfying Spill) nor a dust-sweep (Clean Sweep) - the catch is the magnet pull + size-gated repeated-pass snapping + the fill-and-dump rhythm.
non_timer_pressure: ball capacity meter (resource scarcity - saturates and stops collecting) + arena clean-% target per stage (score target) + jam build-up from un-cleared crates (encroaching clutter = lose condition). No countdown timer.
lose_condition: gs='GAMEOVER' when jammed >= JAM_LIMIT (14 un-cleared non-magnetic crates pile up) while the stage clean target is still unmet. Soft fail - retry keeps all purchased upgrades.
progression: Level-based: 8 arena tiers (Scrapyard -> Foundry Floor -> Sludge Dock -> Rail Depot -> Reactor Bay -> Harbor Wreck -> Crusher Pit -> Magnet Vault); clean each to its rising target % (70% +4%/stage, cap 92%) to advance; clearing stage 8 = WIN. Score economy + three upgrade lines (capacity/pull/radius) persist - the progression dimension a later retention meta can hook.
art: Pure-canvas vector: magnet sphere with red/blue magnetic-pole gradient + accreted scrap shards on the rim; scrap = grey metal polygons/bolts; crates = wooden squares; tar = glossy blobs; mines = purple spiky lumps; glowing recycler pad with chevrons; per-stage dirty-industrial gradient + grime-tile grid. AI cover/icon via Flux (magnet sphere crusted with scrap, sparks, no title text - Yandex 5.6).
stack_rule_note: vanilla per the A/B alternation rule (tight physics-arcade = vanilla); the new build uses the OPPOSITE stack of the previous new game's genesis 'stack' (most recent new build was gulp_rush=phaser).

sources.title: Proven gallery-positive cleaning genre
sources.snippet: Satisfying clearing/removal loops still have market pull - visible before/after progress, area cleanup, simple satisfaction. Lineage: Clean Sweep (17_clean_sweep), Satisfying Spill (71_satisfying_spill, mop-absorb containment), Donut Drift / Clean Sweep Donut (real-time score-clear). Debris Magneto mutates the satisfying-clearing loop into a magnetism + accretion + capacity-dump physics arcade - a fresh pressure type (saturation + jam) the portfolio's cleaning games don't use.

sources.title: Build a 2-hour cleanup prototype
sources.snippet: dirty arena, rolling/dragging cleaner, escalating debris sizes, juicy reveal of clean floor.

platform_target: gallery-first; distinctive enough for CrazyGames; merge/clone-adjacent enough for Yandex once moderation queue clears

gates.webapp_gate: PASS (exit 0; reachability 36 items/16 screens clean across 4 viewports - exposeReach+exposeTour wired)
gates.econ_sim: WARN/PASS (exit 0; no dead zone in first 15 min, no inflation, sinks remain at run end)
gates.locale_overflow: PASS (exit 0; EN+RU button labels fit at narrowest 393px viewport)
gates.passive_lose_reachable: GAMEOVER@~26s stage1 (jam=14), verified headless - lose condition organically reachable <60s

codex_review_applied: Fixed: (1) unreachable lose condition - crates now spawn continuously + jam=settled-crate count, reaches JAM_LIMIT organically; (2) stale gf-lib overlay button - startGame guarded to MENU/GAMEOVER/WON only; (3) skip text routed via GF.t(); (4) removed trophy emoji from gf-lib comment; (5) interstitial gated via onClose before nextStage (no gameplay behind ad); (6) GameplayAPI stop/start on pause/resume; (7) exposeReach+exposeTour added (reachability gate now PASS not WARN). Deferred per assignment: Yandex zip build (platform packaging deferred); remoteConfig CSP is the template's documented submit-time external-host pattern.
